notes: Playground has 18 route pages (template, form-control, input-attributes, validation-flow, etc.) but none implements conditional rendering of fields (show/hide fields based on radio/checkbox/select). Issue #306 describes a bug with conditionally rendered fields losing onInput revalidation after condition change, but the playground has no such page to reproduce it. Checked all 18 available routes in source code - no conditional field toggle exists.
